label: Content credentials, signing & provenance

node.label: Content credentials, signing & provenance
node.definition: Content provenance records origin, transformations, model or tool identity, and integrity metadata through manifests, attestations, or verifiable logs.
node.why_it_matters: It supports auditable lineage even when statistical AI detection is unreliable or content passes through multiple tools.
limitations: Metadata can be stripped, adoption is uneven, and provenance establishes origin rather than truth or safety.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Content credentials, signing & provenance has an `evaluates_or_constrains` dependency on Provenance, citations & evidence tracking because Provenance, citations & evidence tracking is modeled as evaluation, constraint, audit, or governance support.

In this atlas graph, Content credentials, signing & provenance has an `evaluates_or_constrains` dependency on Privacy, governance, licensing & audit because Privacy, governance, licensing & audit is modeled as evaluation, constraint, audit, or governance support.

In this atlas graph, Content credentials, signing & provenance has an `evaluates_or_constrains` dependency on Information theory because Information theory is modeled as evaluation, constraint, audit, or governance support.
